<!--
Motivation-first. One line per section. The diff is the roster — do not list
files or restate the changelog here. No AI attribution or tool bylines.
-->

## What forced this
<!-- The pressure, bug, or disproof that made this change unavoidable. -->

## The call
<!-- The decision, stated as a claim — not a list of edits. -->

## What we deliberately didn't do
<!-- The alternative dropped and the single cost that killed it. -->

## Evidence
<!-- The number or result that settled it, and a link to the prototype or its
     PLAN.md result block. No inline tables. -->

## Surface touched
<!-- SPEC sections / files / prototype dirs, as a range or count —
     "§6.2–6.9, prototypes/p17", never a per-item roster. -->

## If this ages badly
<!-- What to revert or reopen, and the signal that would trigger it. -->
